problem id: 8171f73c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) AND SHR(6)) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01010111 -> 00000000
  00010000 -> 00000000
  00010110 -> 00000000
  11101101 -> 00000011
  01010000 -> 00000000
  11101011 -> 00000011
  00000000 -> 00000000
  00000110 -> 00000000
  10111001 -> 00000011
  01001000 -> 00000000

query: 10101110
predicted answer: 00000001
